name: Haut à Courroies leather handbag
description:
This Hermès Haut à Courroies 32 (HAC 32) is crafted from Courchevel leather with gold hardware, featuring tonal stitching, a front flap with the signature toggle (turn-lock) closure and dual rolled handles.

The Haut à Courroies, the original Hermès travel bag from which the Birkin was derived, is characterized by its taller profile and shorter handles, giving it a distinctly structured and elegant silhouette. In the 32 cm size, the HAC offers the refined proportions of a Kelly or Birkin in a compact, architectural form ideal for everyday use.

The Courchevel leather—a fine-grained, embossed calfskin—is known for its lightweight yet durable finish, subtle sheen, and excellent resistance to scratches and moisture. Its crisp texture allows the bag to hold its shape beautifully over time, while the slightly glossy surface highlights the precision of Hermès craftsmanship.
The interior is lined with smooth leather in a matching tone and features a single open pocket and a zip pocket with an Hermès-engraved pull.
Date code circle Z (1996). No accessories. The handles have been professionally reglazed by a third-party leather specialist. leather aging, scuffs, wear on corners, hairline scratches on hardware.
